narrative:
Choctaw Lake West (precinct in Madison County) has 937 registered voters, with 45.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
